sections.paragraph:
see מִיכָל .

I. מִכְלָה (from the root כָּלָה) f. completion, perfection, found once in plur. 2Ch 4:21, מִכְלֹות זָהָב “perfections of gold,” i.e. the most perfect, the purest gold.

II. מִכְלָה, מִכְלָא (like מֹורָה Psalm 9:21 , for מֹורָא, from the root כָּלָה to shut up), a pen, a fold, Hab 3:18 plur. מִכְלָאֹות Psa 50:9 78:70 .
